author: codex
scope: Codex-only validator/rule-or-data triage for the next current unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape bucket after relation060; deterministic inspection only; no provider-backed commands, generated-output commands, durable data edits, code edits, LOG edits, manifest edits, submissions edits, retired.json edits, canonical edits, or wiki edits

current_count_if_observed.read_only_inventory_basis: Read-only SQLite/JQ/RG inspection of the three visible relation records named by the user, joined to endpoint record kinds in data/canonical.db and data/canonical/relations.jsonl. Did not run validate/materialize/export.

bucket.name: serves_route project->entity
bucket.validator_expectation: Current serves_route allows project|corridor -> route. It should not be widened to allow project -> entity because the entity endpoint is an operator/agency context, not a route endpoint.

recommendation.recommended_action: Retire the malformed serves_route project -> entity submission. Do not add a new replacement in this batch because relation cleanup batch030 already added a valid project -> route serves_route replacement for Penn Station Access to the New Haven Line.
recommendation.why_data_cleanup: The cited source says Penn Access will bring Metro-North service into Penn with four new Bronx stations. That supports Penn Station Access service/route scope, but the submitted object endpoint is a Metro-North entity. A serves_route relation should point to a route, not the operating agency/entity.
recommendation.why_not_validator_code_gap: Allowing serves_route project -> entity would blur route scope with agency role/context. Existing shaped alternatives already cover project -> entity agency facts, such as operated_by or unshaped associated-entity relations; serves_route should remain constrained to route objects.

bad_submission_ids.retire_reason: Malformed serves_route endpoint: subject is the Penn Station Access project, but object is a Metro-North entity. The source-backed route-scope fact is already preserved by batch030 as Penn Station Access serves New Haven Line.

selected_relation_submission.label: Penn Station Access - Brings Metro-North to Penn Station

source_block.summary: Public comment says PCAC looked forward to Penn Access updates and describes bringing Metro-North service into Penn with four new Bronx stations.

endpoint_records_checked.why_wrong_for_serves_route_object: Entity/agency endpoint, not a route endpoint.

endpoint_records_checked.why_existing_replacement_is_valid: Current serves_route rule accepts project -> route.

prior_work_and_collision_checks.batch030_deferred_original: data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch030-prep.json noted this row as deferred because the cited block named Metro-North service rather than a single durable route target.

expected_delta.caveat: Assumes no concurrent relation endpoint-shape work lands before conductor applies this retire-only cleanup. The useful route-scope fact is already present via batch030.

data_cleanup_steps: Retire submission sub_724ffb54454bb964 with a reason tying the malformed serves_route project -> entity endpoint to this prep artifact.
Do not append another replacement relation for this row; rely on existing relation_batch030-penn-station-access-serves-new-haven-line / sub_72a55ab1f5540f9f.
Run only the conductor-owned materialize/export/validate lane after applying, outside this bounded prep task.

code_patch_plan.reason: No validator patch is recommended. Keep serves_route object endpoints constrained to route records; the current row is a data endpoint mistake.

commands_run_read_only: sqlite3 schema inspection of data/canonical.db tables used for records, relations, evidence_refs, record_submissions, record_sources, and record_local_observations
sqlite3 targeted join for the three remaining visible relation ids to endpoint record kinds and submission ids
rg targeted lookup of sub_724ffb54454bb964, sub_700e95b86f5f821d, and sub_a0a60967ae6b4493 in data/submissions
jq targeted read of raw/sources/meeting_doc_121091/blocks.jsonl page 2 / p002_c0004
sqlite3 same-source and project relation inventory for meeting_doc_121091 and project_annual-2021-penn-station-access
sqlite3 route lookup for New Haven Line and existing Penn Station Access serves_route relations
rg targeted prior-work lookup for relation_batch030-penn-station-access-serves-new-haven-line and sub_724ffb54454bb964
